reason: Clueless: Sharp and sweet teen comedy with raunchy humor and relatable awkwardness.
Dazed and Confused: Effortless ‘70s high-school romp brimming with awkward, hilarious moments.
Welcome to the Dollhouse: Darkly comic, cringe-worthy coming-of-age tale that's oddly uplifting.
Billy Madison: Raunchy, over-the-top schoolyard antics from Adam Sandler that still hit funny.
Swingers: Witty 90s buddy comedy about dating misadventures and awkward club scenes.
Reality Bites: Gen-X dramedy that balances cringe and charm in early-adult life crises.
The Doom Generation: Gritty, off-kilter teen road trip comedy with darkly awkward flair.
Clerks: Low-budget slacker comedy packed with raunchy, relatable dialogue and awkward charm.
Go Fish: Sharp, earnest queer coming-of-age comedy that’s refreshingly awkward and heartfelt.
Mad Love: Teen romance comedy that nails the uneasy thrill and horror of first love.
